intelligence.hypothesis: Insufficient telemetry; awaiting next valid capture.

vision_report.compositional_truth_check: The registry is largely non-representative of the current physical state. P1 (Yellow Pot) is present but appears devoid of foliage. P3 (Black Pot with Rabbit) contains a single leaf, but the Pothos structure is severely compromised. P2/P4 are not clearly identifiable as distinct specimens.

inventory_reconciliation.New_Intervention: Presence of eggshell fragments in P3; electronic component (IC chip) on desk surface.

plant_audit.P1: Empty soil surface, no signs of String of Nickels.
plant_audit.P3: Single leaf remaining; significant postural collapse observed over the 5-day sequence.

biome_observations.soil_texture: Consistently dark and damp across all pots.
biome_observations.debris: Eggshell fragments in P3; electronic component (IC chip) placed on the desk surface in the earliest images, removed in later frames.

temporal_deltas.T-minus_5: P3 shows a healthy, upright leaf and a visible stem.
temporal_deltas.T-minus_4: Leaf in P3 begins to show signs of drooping.
temporal_deltas.T-minus_3: Leaf in P3 continues to lose turgor pressure.
temporal_deltas.T-minus_2: Significant wilting; stem structure is failing.
temporal_deltas.T-minus_1: Severe collapse; plant is nearly flush with the soil.
temporal_deltas.Current: Total collapse; only a remnant of the leaf remains visible.

vision_report.visual_health_inference: The biome is in a state of terminal decline. The Pothos (P3) has suffered a catastrophic loss of turgor pressure, likely due to root rot or environmental stress, leading to total structural collapse. P1, P2, and P4 are effectively barren.
anomalies: Eggshell fragments in P3 soil (likely an attempt at calcium supplementation or pH adjustment).
Electronic component (IC chip) on desk surface in early images, suggesting non-botanical desk usage.
vision_report.narrative_description: The audit reveals a rapid, progressive failure of the indoor botanical collection. Over the 5-day observation period, the Pothos in P3 transitioned from a viable, upright specimen to a state of complete collapse. The other pots (P1, P2, P4) show no signs of life, indicating either prior loss or failure to establish. The presence of eggshells suggests an intervention that failed to arrest the decline.
